_README: Maps scoutTraitLibrary category IDs to 9-axis weights. When a prospect's prose matches a library item, the item's category is looked up here and the matched ProseTag entries are emitted with these weights. The 'risk' and 'rebounding' categories don't map to axes; they feed the overall-grade confidence interval / red-flag deductions instead.

_schema.categoryId: Matches scoutTraitLibrary category id (offensive-creation, shooting, etc.)
_schema.axisWeights: Object mapping axis key → contribution weight (0..1). Multiple axes per category supported (e.g., off-ball maps to connect + space).
_schema.feedsRiskFlag: If true (and category isn't axis-mapped), the prose contributes to overall-grade red-flag deductions instead of axis scores.
